_README: DDB characterIds AND userIds for The Breakfast Club (Pacts & Power). Taken from the Campaign Dashboard roster (characterIds) and the Supabase ddb_rolls archive (userIds). The campaign is COMPLETE (ended 2026-05-31), so this is a one-time archive of the party's final sheets — there's no watcher to auto-refresh it. Output files are named after the real character name from each fetched sheet. characterId = the DDB character-sheet ID (number in the sheet URL); userId = the DDB player/account ID. Lance has no characterId on record (left the campaign). Sheets are likely Campaign-Only; add DDB_COBALT to .env to fetch them.
